Franchise Available – Visakhapatnam (Vizag)

Pharma Franchise in Visakhapatnam

Start a PCD pharma franchise or earn as a commission-based Medical Representative in Visakhapatnam with Crasenim Pharma. Exclusive territory rights, WHO GMP certified products, and full company support to grow your pharma business in AP's largest metro.

📍 Visakhapatnam / Vizag 🏢 Exclusive Territory Rights ✅ WHO GMP Certified Products 💰 High Margin Potential
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
Market Opportunity

Why Visakhapatnam is a High-Value Franchise Territory

Visakhapatnam is AP's largest and fastest-growing metro — with a rising middle class, expanding private hospital sector, and one of the highest concentrations of specialist doctors on the coast. For a pharma franchise partner, this translates into consistently high prescription volumes across our portfolio.

Depending on your preferred zone, franchise territories are available across Visakhapatnam city (Dwaraka Nagar, Jagadamba, Gajuwaka, Pendurthi zones) and the adjacent Anakapalli district. The city's strong retail pharmacy density means your products reach patients faster and with better visibility.

Available Franchise Zones – Visakhapatnam

Visakhapatnam North Zone, Visakhapatnam South Zone, Gajuwaka / Industrial Zone, Bheemunipatnam / Beach Road, Anakapalli District (adjacent)

Two Franchise Models Available

PCD Franchise: Buy exclusive territory rights and stock Crasenim Pharma products under your name.

Commission-Based MR: Promote our brands to doctors in Visakhapatnam and earn per prescription — no investment needed.

  • Exclusive monopoly rights in your Vizag zone
  • WHO GMP certified products — strong doctor acceptance
  • Promotional materials: visual aids, samples, product cards
  • High-margin product range across 6 therapeutic categories
  • Growing private hospital and chain pharmacy market
Products

Products Available for Visakhapatnam Franchise

Antibiotic

Amoxsenim-CV 625

Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg. High GP and specialist prescription product in Vizag.

Anti-Hypertensive

Telsenim-40

Telmisartan 40mg with Smartdose™. Strong cardiac department prescription in Visakhapatnam hospitals.

Diabetic

Metsenim-G1/G2

Metformin PR + Glimepiride. High endocrinologist and diabetologist acceptance in Vizag.

Gastric

Pansenim-DSR

Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR. One of the fastest-moving gastric products in the region.

Pediatric Skin

Crasenim Bar

Syndet Bar pH 5.5. Paediatrician-recommended and strong pharmacy counter movement in urban markets.

Wellness

Crasenim-LC

Mecobalamin + Folic Acid + L-Carnitine. Popular in neurology and general medicine clinics in Vizag.

FAQs

Pharma Franchise in Visakhapatnam – FAQ

Are franchise territories still available in Visakhapatnam?
Yes. Multiple zones within Visakhapatnam and Anakapalli are available for PCD franchise. Contact us to check availability in your specific preferred area of Vizag.
Do I need prior pharma experience to take a franchise in Visakhapatnam?
For a PCD franchise, prior pharma sales or distribution experience is an advantage but not mandatory. We provide complete product training, detailing support, and promotional material. For commission-based MR roles, any motivated person with a local doctor network qualifies.
What is the minimum investment for a Visakhapatnam pharma franchise?
Investment starts from a small initial stock purchase aligned to your zone size. Contact our franchise team via WhatsApp for specific current figures for Visakhapatnam territories.
How do I enquire about a pharma franchise in Visakhapatnam?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 or fill the enquiry form on our Franchise page. Our franchise team will call you within 24 hours.

Enquire about PCD franchise territories and commission-based MR opportunities in Visakhapatnam today.
